PT ADA Asia Indonesia.Account: SELECT Id, Account.Id, Account.Name, Account.BillingStreet, Account.BillingCity, Account.BillingCountry FROM Opportunity WHERE Id = '{opp_id}'
PT ADA Asia Indonesia.QuoteLineItem:
SELECT Id, Product2.Name, QuoteId, Quote.Name, ListPrice, TotalPrice, Quantity, PricebookEntry.Pricebook2Id, PricebookEntryId, Flight_Start__c, Flight_End__c, Product2Id
FROM QuoteLineItem
WHERE Quote.OpportunityId = '{opp_id}' AND Quote.IsSyncing = true
